hero.title: Welcome to the MYCo Handbook on Generational Inclusion and Diversity
hero.subtitle: A practical resource for HR professionals, trainers, and facilitators to navigate intergenerational dynamics and foster inclusive workplaces.

personalised.title: Your Personalised Handbook
personalised.description: The Handbook provides a theoretical foundation for understanding generational diversity in the workplace, bringing together research and insights on the key themes that shape collaboration between different generations. However, you may not need to explore all the content. For this reason, the platform allows you to select only the sections most relevant to your specific context, whether you want to focus on a particular generation, a specific topic, or a combination of both. In this way, you can create a resource tailored to your needs and download it as a customised PDF.
personalised.research: The Handbook is based on transnational research conducted across the five partner countries and explores how four generations — Baby Boomers, Generation X, Millennials and Generation Z — experience today’s world of work.Rather than reinforcing generational stereotypes, the aim is to provide an evidence-based knowledge base that helps organisations, trainers and adult educators better understand intergenerational dynamics and foster more inclusive and collaborative workplaces.

howItWorks.title: How to Create Your Custom Handbook

step1.title: Choose a Theme
step1.description: Select from five research-based themes: communication, values, diversity, digital skills, or intergenerational learning.

step2.title: Pick a Subtopic
step2.description: Each theme contains three specific topics developed from our transnational research findings.

step3.title: Select a Generation
step3.description: Focus on the generation most relevant to your context: Gen Z, Millennials, Gen X, or Baby Boomers.

step4.title: Build & Export
step4.description: Add the pages you need to your personalised handbook and download it as a PDF.

selfAssessment.title: Self-Assessment Test
selfAssessment.description: Measure your awareness of generational diversity and your ability to manage intergenerational dynamics inclusively. The test consists of 10 questions randomly selected from our research-based question pool, covering all five thematic areas.
selfAssessment.recommendation: We recommend completing the test before and after exploring the Handbook to track your progress.

projectQuote: "MYCo – Meet Your Colleague" is an Erasmus+ funded project bringing together five European partners to create practical tools for generational inclusion. Through research, training activities, and interactive resources, we aim to move beyond stereotypes and build workplaces where every generation can thrive.
